prestazioni: Engine: GDI 3.8L Lambda II V6 (G6DT) – Forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (10.5psi boost, billet compressor wheel, 62mm inducer) paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping kit from Vibrant Performance, including a 1200cc ID1000 fuel injector upgrade and a Motec M150 ECU reflash for 450whp on E85 fuel.

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (KIA Telluride-specific valving, 24-way adjustable compression/rebound, 2.5" drop) with Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers and Whiteline front/rear sway bars (24mm hollow, adjustable end links) to eliminate body roll.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD (KIA Telluride SX-specific 8-bolt differential) with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch (ceramic puck, 600ft-lb torque capacity) and a custom 4.10:1 ring & pinion gear set from Revolution Gear & Axle for improved acceleration.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (KIA Telluride-specific, carbon fiber fenders, aggressive front splitter, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof.

Wheels: Rotiform LAS-R 22x10.5" ET25 (front) and 22x12" ET35 (rear) forged wheels with Nitto Ridge Grappler 285/35R22 (front) and 305/30R22 (rear) tires, paired with H&R TRAK+ 25mm wheel spacers for flush fitment.

Lighting: Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED headlight upgrade (5,000-lumen output, CRI 90+) with a custom Morimoto XB35 HID projector retrofit and sequential LED turn signals from VLEDS, plus a full carbon fiber engine cover from Seibon.
